name: 90 fl oz Glass Tall- Pitcher with Handle - Threshold™: Traditional Clear Drink Server, Lead-Free
description:
From admiring the amber hues of the setting sun with your favorite drink in hand to sit-down festive brunches to everyday meals, bring a touch of style to mealtimes with the Tall Glass Pitcher with Handle from Threshold™. Made from BPA-free glass, this tall pitcher features an easy-pour spout for effortless pouring of your favorite cold beverages, while the curved handle makes holding and carrying convenient. Featuring a beaker-like silhouette with a clear design, this glass pitcher brings a striking update to your dinner table.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
